title: Blood Moon
description: Spice up your game with a deadly Blood Moon!
body:
![Blood Moon title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c560ef0f9b4e725a46cdea1c5ed7e2d68fee606f.png)
Every 7 days a Blood Moon will occur during night! Mob spawns are increased and Bloody Zombies that deal more damage and survive the day will spawn. You will not be able to sleep during a Blood Moon. ![Blood Moon Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mnVsOYyG/images/40d47c6d5656139cfc6ccecdabe8f06d0ba1ac66.gif) ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚙️ Compatibility An Internet Connection is required for the Textures to be loaded. This datapack is not compatible with datapacks which allow time to be skipped, like [Sky Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sky-artifacts). The Bloody Zombies might also kill your villagers, even if you think they are safe. ## 🤝 Special Thanks, Attributions We did not make the Art for the new in this pack ourselfes, the custom Blocks are all Player heads. Thanks to all the Creators and Contributors on minecraft-heads.com, who made this Data Pack possible!
